Package neqsim.process.safety.hazid

Class FMEAWorksheet.FMEAEntry

java.lang.Object
neqsim.process.safety.hazid.FMEAWorksheet.FMEAEntry
All Implemented Interfaces:

Enclosing class:
FMEAWorksheet
public static class FMEAWorksheet.FMEAEntry extends Object implements Serializable
One row of an FMEA worksheet.
